name: python3-tomlkit
title: python3-tomlkit
description:
style-preserving TOML library for Python
TOML Kit is a 1.0.0rc1-compliant TOML (Tom's Obvious, Minimal Language)
library.
.
It includes a parser that preserves all comments, indentations, whitespace
and internal element ordering, and makes them accessible and editable via an
intuitive API.
.
You can also create new TOML documents from scratch using the provided
helpers.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-tomlkit because style-preserving TOML library for Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-tomlkit as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-tomlkit with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-tomlkit --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
